# CLAUDE.md

This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.

## Build System

This is a **NetBeans Java Desktop Application** built with **Apache Ant**. Java 25 is required.

Build commands (run from project root):

```bash
# Build the project
ant jar

# Clean build artifacts
ant clean

# Run the application
ant run

# Run tests (test directory is currently empty)
ant test
```

The distribution JAR is output to `dist/LuminaRealEstateSystem.jar`.

**Do not manually edit** `nbproject/build-impl.xml` — it is auto-generated by NetBeans.

## Architecture

Role-based Swing desktop application with three user roles. `MainJFrame` (the entry point) acts as a container that swaps JPanels depending on the authenticated user role:

- `LoginPage` — authentication UI (JPanel)
- `AdminPage` — administrator dashboard (JPanel)
- `AgentPage` — real estate agent interface (JPanel)
- `BuyerPage` — buyer/customer interface (JPanel)

Each UI panel has a paired `.form` file (NetBeans GUI Designer XML). **Edit `.form` files only through the NetBeans GUI Designer**, or edit the corresponding `.java` file directly in the `// <editor-fold>` sections carefully — NetBeans regenerates the `initComponents()` method from the `.form` file on save.

The `MyLib/Lot.java` class is a placeholder intended as the data model for real estate properties. The `MyApp/Main.java` is an empty placeholder and not the actual entry point — `MainJFrame.java` (default package) contains the real `main()` method.

## Key Details

- All source files are in the **default package** (directly under `src/`) except `MyApp.Main` and `MyLib.Lot`
- The project uses **Nimbus** look and feel (configured in `MainJFrame.main()`)
- `main.class` in `nbproject/project.properties` is currently empty — set it to `MainJFrame` to enable `ant run`
- No external library dependencies; uses only standard Java SE / Swing
- Source encoding: UTF-8
